% Auto-generated by cmd/render — full baseline manifests per scenario.
% \input-able; each block is plain verbatim (no package needed).
% scenario: configmap-ref-wrong-name — fault: Ref_NotFound
\begin{verbatim}
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: api
          image: ghcr.io/acme/api:2.3.1
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: api-config
            - secretRef:
                name: api-secret
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: api-configs
  namespace: production
data:
  LOG_LEVEL: info
  REGION: eu-west-1
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: api-secret
  namespace: production
type: Opaque
stringData:
  API_KEY: redacted-api-key
  DB_PASSWORD: redacted-password
\end{verbatim}

% scenario: selector-label-mismatch — fault: SelectorMismatch
\begin{verbatim}
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-frontend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web
          image: nginx:1.25
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
\end{verbatim}

% scenario: service-port-mismatch — fault: PortMismatch
\begin{verbatim}
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: checkout
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: checkout
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: checkout
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: checkout
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: checkout
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: checkout
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: checkout
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: checkout
          image: ghcr.io/acme/checkout:1.4.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
\end{verbatim}

% scenario: service-selector-mismatch — fault: SelectorMismatch
\begin{verbatim}
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: storefront
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web
          image: nginx:1.25
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
\end{verbatim}
